_description: Player ID → profile photo URL mapping. Use this file to attach jersey-accurate IPL photos.
_instructions: Two ways to add a player photo:
1. Drop a JPG file at /public/photos/players/{playerId}.jpg (generic, not season-specific)
2. Drop a JPG file at /public/photos/players/{playerId}_{season}.jpg (season-specific, IPL-jersey-accurate)
3. OR add a URL to the `photos` map below keyed by {playerId} or {playerId}_{season}
The Avatar component checks in this order:
c. URL from this file via the `photos` map
Note: Wikipedia photos of players are generally in national-team jerseys, not IPL jerseys,
so they were intentionally removed from this file. Populate it with IPL-jersey photos
manually sourced from official franchise/IPL websites.
